AI Sales Academy

Structured, interactive curriculum modules designed to upskill your SDRs and AEs into AI-augmented closers.

Module 1 • Completed

CRM Hygiene 101

Learn why clean data is the fuel for any AI sales tool and how to automate entry.

Review Module
Module 2 • In Progress (75%)

Intro to AI Prompting

Stop chatting and start commanding. Basic structures for drafting cold emails via LLMs.

Resume Module
Module 3 • Locked

Active Listening & Transcripts

Leveraging live call transcription features to spot buying signals.

Complete Module 2 to Unlock
Module 1 • Not Started

Objection Handling with AI

Using live battlecards during competitive discovery calls.

Start Module
Module 2 • Locked

Multi-Threading Context

Mapping buyer circles automatically from unstructured email threads.

Complete Module 1 to Unlock

Advanced Modules Locked

You must complete the Intermediate tier curriculum to unlock Advanced workflows like Custom API Integrations and Predictable Revenue Modeling.

Product Changelog

V.2.4.1 Live
Sep 24, 2026 v2.4.1

LLM Engine Upgrade (Claude 3.5 Integration)

We've entirely swapped our base transcription reasoning engine to support the latest Claude models, resulting in 40% faster battlecard triggers during live discovery calls.

  • Added support for 15 new languages in live translation.
  • Fixed a bug where CRM sync failed on nested custom objects.
  • New 'Executive Summary' tab added to the post-call dashboard.
Aug 10, 2026 v2.3.0

HubSpot Bi-Directional Webhooks

Complete overhaul of our HubSpot integration. Changes made in Sales Saathi now instantly reflect in your CRM via real-time webhooks, eliminating the 5-minute sync delay.

  • Added OAuth 2.0 flow for easier connection.
  • Field mapping UI redesigned for Enterprise users.
View complete changelog history
